mapper.select: SELECT tenant_id, client_id, session_id, turn_id, seq, trace_id, actor, event_type, payload, turn_status, delivery_status, created_at FROM skill_turn_snapshot WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND turn_id = #{turnId} ORDER BY seq DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skill_turn_snapshot ( tenant_id, client_id, session_id, turn_id, seq, trace_id, actor, event_type, payload, turn_status, delivery_status ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{clientId}, #{sessionId}, #{turnId}, #{seq}, #{traceId}, #{actor}, #{eventType}, #{payload}, #{turnStatus}, #{deliveryStatus} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE payload = VALUES(payload), turn_status = VALUES(turn_status), delivery_status = VALUES(delivery_status), trace_id = VALUES(trace_id), actor = VALUES(actor), event_type = VALUES(event_type)
